zh.Whitchurch,Shropshire,England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾其其
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Blancminster於1205年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾其其時，他的父親William FitzRalph50歲，母親Lucy Toret28歲。他於1230年4月11日之後與Eve FitzWarin結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1260年6月11日在英國史洛普爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Blancminster于1205年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾其其时，他的父亲William FitzRalph50岁，母亲Lucy Toret28岁。他于1230年4月11日之后与Eve FitzWarin结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1260年6月11日在英国史洛普爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Blancminster was born in 1205, in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William FitzRalph, was 50 and his mother, Lucy Toret, was 28. He married Eve FitzWarin after 11 April 1230. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 11 June 1260, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Blancminster est né en 1205, à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William FitzRalph, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Lucy Toret, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Eve FitzWarin après 11 avril 1230. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1260, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Blancminster 1205 in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William FitzRalph 50 und seine Mutter Lucy Toret 28. Er hat nach 11. April 1230 Eve FitzWarin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Juni 1260 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Blancminster è nato il nel 1205 nel Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William FitzRalph, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Toret, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Eve FitzWarin dopo il 11 aprile 1230. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 11 giugno 1260, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Blancminsterが1205年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィトチャーチで生まれた時，父William FitzRalphは50歳，母Lucy Toretは28歳であった。1230年4月11日以後にEve FitzWarinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1260年6月11日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Blancminster(이)가 1205년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzRalph(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Toret(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1230년 4월 11일 이후 Eve FitzWarin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1260년 6월 11일 영국 슈럽실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Blancminster nasceu em 1205, em Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William FitzRalph, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Toret, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve FitzWarin após 11 de abril de 1230. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de junho de 1260, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Blancminster родился в 1205 г. в местности уичурч, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William FitzRalph было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Toret, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve FitzWarin после 11 апрель 1230 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 11 июня 1260 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Blancminster nació en 1205, en Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William FitzRalph, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Lucy Toret, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Eve FitzWarin después de 11 de abril de 1230. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de junio de 1260, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
